result.summary: Roaring exposes developer APIs and webhooks, and the portal indicates API keys are used for authentication, but no machine-readable spec URLs, endpoint base URLs, or auth binding details are present in the corpus.

roaring_api_key.label: Roaring API key
roaring_api_key.setup: Open the [Roaring developer portal](https://developer.roaring.io/) and go to **Organisation API Keys** to get your API keys. The corpus confirms API keys exist, but it does not show the exact creation page, one-time display behavior, or the exact request header/query binding.

surfaces.name: Roaring APIs
surfaces.notes: The developer portal advertises APIs and says 'Get your API Keys, authenticate, make test calls and get going', but the corpus does not provide a base URL, OpenAPI document, or exact authentication mechanics.

surfaces.name: Roaring Webhooks
surfaces.notes: The developer portal advertises webhooks for receiving real-time alerts, but the corpus does not include delivery/authentication details, signing scheme, or callback setup endpoints.
